title: Đấu Trường Chân Lý
desc:
Decision on approving the content of the G1 online video game script No. 2192/QD-BTTTT issued by the Ministry of Information and Communications on November 9, 2023
Put your team-building skills to the test with Truth Arena, the multiplayer auto-battle tactical PvP game from the studio that created League of Legends.
Use 100% of your brain to choose champions, arrange their positions, and win a 1vs-all match of 8 players. With hundreds of team combinations and ever-changing gameplay trends, all kinds of tactics can be applied. But of course, there will always be only 1 winner.
Master turn-based tactics and compete in the ultimate auto-battle arena. Join a series of game modes that are somewhat similar to chess: from social to competitive, to outsmart your opponents and become the last one standing at the top.
K.O. WAR OF HEROES
Welcome everyone to the ultimate anime martial arts tournament! This is where the best of all anime genres gather, promising intense battles like never before! Tournament boss Whisker is calling you to show your skills. It's time to show off your martial arts prowess with vivid, intense moves in the uncompromising clash of the century - ENTER THE BATTLE NOW!
Assemble your dream team and unleash your superpowers in the arena. Activate the power of friendship with the Star Guardians, teach your opponents a lesson with the Warrior Academy, or join forces in the ultimate mechanical showdown with the Grand Mecha. Whichever team you choose, put on a show that will warm up the arena!
That's not all, folks. Charge into the arena with Tiny Champions, Spirits, Portals, and a brand new event pass to make your journey to the top even more explosive.
ANIME-BASED TOURNAMENT
Enter the arena and get ready to compete with a team of champions from the shared champion pool.
Fight through countless rounds to become the last strategist standing.
Randomized choices and events in each match ensure no two matches are the same, so use your creativity and ingenuity to devise a winning strategy.
PLAY ANYWHERE
Challenge your friends and destroy your opponents in turn-based arenas on PC, Mac, and mobile.
Queue together and see if your team has what it takes to come out on top.
RANKING UP IN THE ARENA
Full support for ranked features and PvP queues will ensure that there are countless ways for you to outdo your opponents.
From Iron to Challenger, climb or de-rank depending on your final rank in each match.
A great strategy can also bring you exclusive Ranked rewards at the end of each season!
SUPERSTITIONS
Are you ready to unleash all your power?! Whisker will give out Power Cakes to your champions, opening up an arsenal of Ultimate options to help you fight against any opponent. With countless Ultimate options waiting for you to discover, from team-wide effects to unique champion powers, every match will be a completely different battle.
Go into battle with your favorite Mini Champion or Spirit!
Collect new items by playing the game, or purchase them directly from the TFT store.
PLAY AND RECEIVE
Collect free treasures in the new K.O. Heroes Pass, or upgrade to Pass+ to unlock more awesome rewards!
Download and play Teamfight Tactics today!
